title: Requirements Engineering Tasks
prompt: 简述 / 列举 Requirements Engineering Tasks 的核心要点。
points: Inception:对项目建立基本的理解(context free questions)
Elicitation:询问客户的需求(Normal Expected Exciting Req/ Non-Functional Req)
Negotiation:参与各方均能达到一定的满意度

title: 7 Basic Design Principles
prompt: 简述 / 列举 7 Basic Design Principles 的核心要点。
points: Open-Closed Principle:开放扩展，关闭修改
Liskov Substitution Principle:子类可以被父类替换
Interface Segregation Principle:接口隔离(客户端对应specific interface)
Release Reuse Equivalency Principle:发布的粒度是重用的粒度
Common Closure Principle:一起变的类在一起
Common Reuse Principle:不一起重用的类在一起

title: Why does software need to evolve over time?
prompt: Why does software need to evolve over time?
points: 用户发现 bug，需要修复；
用户需求变化，需要增加或修改功能；
业务环境变化，需要适应新的业务规则；
技术环境变化，比如 OS、硬件、数据库、浏览器、接口变化；
为了提高质量、性能、可维护性，也需要演化。

title: three primary objectives of the analysis model
prompt: 简述 / 列举 three primary objectives of the analysis model 的核心要点。
points: To describe what the customer requires.
To establish a basis for the creation of a software design.
To define a set of requirements that can be validated once the software is built.

points: What obstacles are blocking my work?
